mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_attachments ( board_id, original_name, stored_name, file_url, file_size, content_type ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{contentType} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, board_id, original_name, stored_name, file_url, file_size, content_type, created_at, updated_at FROM board_attachments WHERE board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, board_id, original_name, stored_name, file_url, file_size, content_type, created_at, updated_at FROM board_attachments WHERE id = #{id} AND board_id = #{boardId}
mapper.update: UPDATE board_attachments SET original_name = #{originalName}, stored_name = #{storedName}, file_url = #{fileUrl}, file_size = #{fileSize}, content_type = #{contentType}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND board_id = #{boardId}
